stars_count.label: Stars Count
stars_count.description: The total number of stargazers for the repository.

forks_count.label: Forks Count
forks_count.description: The total number of forks/copies of the repository.

watchers_count.label: Watchers Count
watchers_count.description: The number of users currently watching the repository.

open_issues_count.label: Open Issues Count
open_issues_count.description: The number of open issues in the repository.

commit_count.label: Commit Count
commit_count.description: The total number of commits in the repository history.

branch_count.label: Branch Count
branch_count.description: The number of branches in the repository.

commits_last_5_years.label: Commits (Last 5 Years)
commits_last_5_years.description: Commits made in the last 60 months.

total_lines_scc.label: Total Lines (SCC)
total_lines_scc.description: Number of total lines in text-based files (SCC).

code_lines_scc.label: Code Lines (SCC)
code_lines_scc.description: Number of code lines in text-based files (SCC).

comment_lines_scc.label: Comment Lines (SCC)
comment_lines_scc.description: Number of comment lines in text-based files (SCC).

blank_lines_scc.label: Blank Lines (SCC)
blank_lines_scc.description: Number of blank lines in text-based files (SCC).
